overall.description: First-person dashboard camera footage from Cyberpunk 2077, driving through Night City at night. The vehicle navigates from tunnels through neon-lit streets, elevated highways with holographic billboards, and the Corpo Plaza district, showcasing the game's futuristic cyberpunk aesthetic with heavy neon lighting and modern architecture.

scene_state.functional_zone: tunnel exit leading to elevated highway

events.description: vehicle exits concrete tunnel into open neon-lit city street
accelerating onto elevated highway ramp from street level

agents.ego_description: navigating through tunnel exit and merging onto elevated highway, accelerating to high speed

entered.detail: rough concrete walls of the underpass tunnel with graffiti and wear marks
bright red and blue neon signage on distant buildings visible after tunnel exit
tall concrete barriers lining the elevated highway to reduce noise
futuristic high-rise buildings with illuminated windows forming the city skyline

segments.scene_description: The segment begins inside a concrete tunnel with rough walls, then transitions to an open city street with neon-lit buildings. The vehicle accelerates onto an elevated highway, passing sound barriers with the city skyline visible in the distance.

events.description: passing large pink holographic billboard displaying a human figure on the right side

agents.ego_description: speeding along elevated highway at 60-70 km/h, maintaining steady course past holographic advertisements

entered.detail: large floating holographic advertisement with pink neon human figure and purple accents
concrete overpass bridge crossing above the highway

segments.scene_description: Driving at high speed along an elevated highway with concrete sound barriers. A large pink holographic billboard appears on the right, displaying a futuristic advertisement. The city skyline with illuminated skyscrapers continues in the background.

events.description: slowing to stop for pedestrians crossing the street at intersection
executing left turn at intersection onto commercial street

agents.ego_description: exiting highway to street level, stopping for pedestrians crossing at intersection, then navigating left turn through commercial district

notable_agents.action: two pedestrians in casual clothing crossing the street in front of the stopped vehicle

entered.detail: ground floor commercial buildings with illuminated storefronts and signage
white striped pedestrian crossing lines on the asphalt
bright neon signs for various businesses including restaurants and shops

segments.scene_description: The vehicle exits the highway to street level, approaching an intersection where two pedestrians are crossing. After stopping to let them pass, the vehicle turns left onto a commercial street lined with neon-lit storefronts and restaurants.

scene_state.functional_zone: high-speed underpass tunnel with directional signage

events.description: entering highway tunnel system with overhead lighting
passing district signage indicating DOWNTOWN and CITY CENTER zones

agents.ego_description: merging back onto highway and entering long underpass tunnel, maintaining high speed through the illuminated corridor

entered.detail: large concrete archway marking the entrance to the underpass tunnel
smooth concrete walls of the underpass with horizontal construction lines
regularly spaced ceiling lights illuminating the tunnel interior
illuminated sign reading ENTERING DOWNTOWN with futuristic typography
illuminated sign reading ENTERING CITY CENTER with arrow indicators

segments.scene_description: The vehicle re-enters the highway and drives into a long underpass tunnel with smooth concrete walls and overhead lighting. District signage for Downtown and City Center appears on the left as the vehicle maintains high speed through the enclosed corridor.

scene_state.functional_zone: Corpo Plaza commercial district with covered terminal approach

events.description: exiting tunnel into the Corpo Plaza district with modern glass architecture
approaching covered glass-roofed terminal structure with support columns

agents.ego_description: exiting tunnel into the upscale Corpo Plaza district, navigating through modern commercial area and approaching a covered terminal entrance

entered.detail: sign indicating ENTERING CORPO PLAZA with corporate styling
tall skyscraper with reflective glass facade and illuminated windows
large transportation terminal building with glass and steel construction
transparent glass roof structure covering the approach to the terminal

segments.scene_description: Exiting the tunnel into the Corpo Plaza district, the scene opens to reveal modern glass skyscrapers and upscale commercial buildings. The vehicle drives toward a large covered terminal with a transparent glass roof canopy, passing digital advertisement screens and illuminated building facades.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous first-person drive that transitions from enclosed concrete tunnels through neon-lit highways and eventually into the polished architecture of the Corpo Plaza district. It begins within a rough-walled tunnel before emerging onto an open city street and accelerating onto an elevated highway, where the view expands to reveal a distant skyline and a massive pink holographic billboard. As the vehicle descends back to street level, it pauses for pedestrians at an intersection before turning through a commercial corridor of neon storefronts. The scene then shifts back into a high-speed transit through a smooth underpass tunnel marked by district signage for Downtown and City Center. Finally, the camera exits the tunnel into the open air of Corpo Plaza, gliding past glass skyscrapers and digital screens toward a large terminal with a transparent glass roof canopy.
